Learn by doing

School Trips

Your students will talk about this trip for years.

● Day visits: up to 100 students | ● Overnight stays available | ● Teacher accommodation: complimentary
Why Mitraay for school trips?

Classroom learning ends at the gate.
Real learning starts in the field.

Mitraay is designed for school groups seeking hands-on, curriculum-connected experiences. We combine agricultural learning, local history, environmental awareness, and cultural immersion, all in a safe, supervised environment.

Safe & supervisedTeacher-accompaniedStructured itineraryVegetarian mealsDay or overnightWestern washroomsFirst aid on property

Groups eat together in the covered indoor dining pavilion. A large TV is available for educational screenings and post-activity discussions.

Right here on the farm

What students experience

Agriculture

Farm Tour

Walk the working farm. Students see seasonal crops up close, learn about soil, water, and food systems, from seed to plate.

Environment

Nature Walk

Guided walk through Sahyadri foothills. Identifying plants, birds, insects, and river ecosystems in the wild.

Outdoors

River Bathing

Safe, supervised river swim at the property bank. Students connect with a natural water body, a joyful memory they carry home.

Home Science

Cooking Class

Traditional Konkan recipes under the open pavilion. Students learn about local ingredients, food culture, and cooking from scratch.

Kids eat what they help grow: rice and vegetables from the fields.

A short drive away

Outside experiences

History · 25km

Raigad Fort & Ropeway

Ride the ropeway up to Raigad Fort for panoramic Sahyadri views. Then walk Shivaji Maharaj's capital with a guide. A living history lesson for Class 4–12.

Heritage · 25km

Raigad Fort Trek

Walk the ramparts of Chhatrapati Shivaji's capital. Immersive Maratha history followed by a village walk below the fort. Guide and tour manager arranged.

Moments from school trips

Book a school trip

Give your students an experience that sticks.

We work with teachers and principals to build a structured program that complements your curriculum and fits your school's budget. Day visits welcome up to 100 students; overnight stays available.

Enquire About School Trips
Mitraay

Come with your people. Leave with a story.

A purposeful farm retreat near Raigad Fort, Raigad, Maharashtra. Built for groups who want more than a getaway.

A project by Vedbhoomi Eco Village
